name: Digital River
description: Digital River — Global commerce and Merchant of Record provider for enterprise cross-border payments and tax

seo.title: Digital River — Invoicing / Taxes / Sales Tax
seo.meta_description: Digital River: Digital River — Global commerce and Merchant of Record provider for enterprise cross-border payments and tax

when_to_use: Enterprise MoR for cross-border software and digital goods with global tax
Localized payment method support for enterprise software global checkout
VAT/GST collection and remittance for enterprise selling into EU/APAC
Subscription commerce platform for large software vendors going global

pros: Full MoR with tax, fraud and FX handled
cons: Reputation hits after high-profile payout disputes
Take rate and fees are notoriously opaque
Checkout and API DX feel dated
review.verdict: Legacy global MoR with real capability but recent trust issues — negotiate contracts very carefully.
review.best_for: Enterprise merchants needing compliant cross-border commerce and willing to sign long contracts.
review.not_for: Any team that needs predictable fees, fast payouts or modern developer experience.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
